title: Better, Fresher 3D Books VR
description: A resource pack that adds 3D book models and individual enchanted book textures tailored for Vivecraft!
body:
# Better, Fresher 3D Books for Vivecraft

**A port of [Better, Fresher 3D Books](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bray-cyber-3d-enchanted-books) by Bray and Cyber, made visually compatible with [Vivecraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/vivecraft).**

---

## 📗 About the Original Pack

> *This resource pack is a collaboration between Bray and Cyber to expand on "Bray's Better Books" and make unique 3D models for every enchantment in the game with lots of neat details and animated effects!*

> *By design, you will see the 2D sprite of the book when it is in your Inventory, in an Item Frame or on the ground. When you hold the book in your right hand you will see an opened-book variant and when you hold it in your left hand it will be closed, offering even more variety and nuance.*

> *Now you can find your enchanted books at a glance and look good doing it :)*

---

## 🥽 Vivecraft Compatibility

This version ensures all custom book models are rendered correctly in **Vivecraft's VR environment**, maintaining full immersion while holding books.

---
